root.name: Add a bullet point with a fact about worm reproduction in slide 5
root.description: Evaluates whether a bullet point containing a fact about worm reproduction was correctly added to slide 5, and that no extraneous or undesired changes were made.

children.name: Bullet point added to slide 5
children.description: Checks that a new bullet point was added to slide 5.

children.name: Bullet point exists in slide 5
children.description: Verifies that a new bullet point has been added to slide 5.

children.name: Bullet point is not a duplicate
children.description: Checks that the new bullet point is not a duplicate of existing bullet points on slide 5.

children.name: Bullet point factuality and relevance
children.description: Verifies that the newly added bullet point is a fact and specifically about worm reproduction.

children.name: No extraneous changes
children.description: Checks that no unrelated modifications were made to the presentation (other than the added bullet point).

children.name: No unrelated slide content changes
children.description: Verifies that only slide 5 was modified and only by addition of the new bullet point.

children.name: No changes to animations or transitions
children.description: Checks that no animations or transitions were added, removed, or modified in any slide.

metadata.task: Add a bullet point with a fact about worm reproduction in slide 5
